title: Rusty Moss
description: Simple alternative to vanilla iron farming.
body:
# Contents

### Rusty Moss

- Found in lush caves (fairly rare)
- Can be dug by hand (no pickaxe or hoe or silk touch required)

### Rusty Nugget

- A rusted iron nugget
- Can be turned into a regular iron nugget by smelting in a furnace
- Or in a blast furnace

## Iron Farming

- When **flowing** water touches Rusty Moss on any side, there is a small chance for a Rusty Nugget to spawn
- Figure out the rest on your own

# Boring Stuff

### Requirements

- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/versions?g=1.20.1)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.20.1)

## Configuration

- Can be found under `config/rusty_moss.cfg`

Default config:
```
rusty_nugget_drop_chance_multiplier = 1.0
```

The magic number affects the chance at which the rusty nuggets spawn.
